title: HandoffToUser
description: Payload emitted when a workflow phase pauses at a HandoffToUser checkpoint, surfacing a message and breakout flag to the operator.

workflow_id.description: Identifier of the workflow that raised this checkpoint.

phase_id.description: Identifier of the phase that raised this checkpoint.

message.description: Human-readable message for the operator explaining what needs review.

breakout.description: When true the workflow terminates after surfacing the message; when false the workflow pauses and waits for hymenium resume.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the checkpoint was raised.
